changes.detail: May 3 Playwright: Studio $1,920, 1BR $2,135, 2BR $2,585. No change from May 1. Unit counts updated in news card: Studio 3, 1BR 4, 2BR 1. News card updated with today's date.

May 3 Playwright: 2BR $1,775-$2,065 confirmed (same as stored). Scrape JSON showed 10 units available vs HTML's 12 — likely stale JS widget. No price change. Site confirmed live. News card date updated.
May 3 Playwright: 1BR $1,925/mo confirmed stable. $500 OFF first month still active. No change from April 15. News card prepended.
May 3 Playwright: 1BR $1,975, Corner $1,995, 2BR $2,445. No change from April 16. News card prepended with confirmation.

Homepage confirms 'One Month Free Rent on 13-month lease on all One-Bedrooms! Reduced Rent on Two-Bedrooms!' ongoing. JS iframe still blocking availability extraction. News card prepended with special confirmation.
Playwright confirmed floor plan names/sqft. Prices JS-rendered (no dollar amounts exposed). No change from stored data. Prices last confirmed April 1: 1BR ~$2,400, 2BR ~$3,500, 3BR ~$4,200.
Playwright confirmed floor plan names/sqft. Prices JS-rendered (no dollar amounts exposed). No change from stored data.
Wix site loads but pricing in JS widgets. Contact (860) 772-2253. No change from stored April 13 prices: 1BR $1,855/mo, 2BR Oak Grove $2,320, West Farm $2,650.
Cloudflare blocking direct site. No price extraction. Prices stale per April 27: 1BR $2,096/mo, 2BR $2,594/mo, 3BR $3,916/mo.
gullharborct.com/floorplans still HTTP 404 (12+ days). Prices via Zillow May 2: $1,550-$1,695/mo. No site access.
